title: melicope mauii
intro: Melicope mauii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Hawaii and also known as the Maui Island Yellow-wood. The plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Melicope mauii include its potential to reduce inflammation, treat respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Melicope mauii can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and are often used to promote wound healing and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
